data.name: CF-WAF-XSS — Cross-Site Scripting against shop.novamind.ai (WAF ML score)
data.description: Detects reflected/stored XSS attempts on the NovaMind webstore (e.g. product-review forms and search) using Cloudflare's WAF machine-learning XSS attack score (unmapped.WAFXSSAttackScore, class_uid 4002, 'HTTP Requests'). Score is 1-99 where LOWER is more malicious and NULL on benign; we cast with number(), require the score to be present, and fire only in the high-confidence malicious band 1-20. Groups by src_ip + host + country, one alert per attacking source, carrying request count, lowest (worst) score, and the most-malicious URI via max_by on inverted score. Low false-positive because it relies on Cloudflare's trained ML classifier, not a brittle regex, and excludes the benign 21-99 band and unscored requests. Any qualifying request triggers (rule threshold >0). MITRE ATT&CK T1059.007 (JavaScript) and T1190 (Exploit Public-Facing Application). Covers OneFlare scenario 02.

scheduledParams.query:
class_uid=4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset='HTTP Requests' unmapped.WAFXSSAttackScore=*
| let src_ip    = src_endpoint.ip
| let host      = http_request.url.hostname
| let country   = src_endpoint.location.country
| let xss_score = number(unmapped.WAFXSSAttackScore)
| let malice    = 100 - xss_score
| filter xss_score >= 1 AND xss_score <= 20
| group
    attack_requests = count(),
    lowest_score    = min(xss_score),
    sample_uri      = max_by(http_request.url.url_string, malice),
    sample_ua       = any(http_request.user_agent),
    first_seen      = oldest(timestamp),
    last_seen       = newest(timestamp)
  by src_ip, host, country
| let detection_time = simpledateformat(last_seen, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss z')
| sort -attack_requests
| columns detection_time, src_ip, host, country, attack_requests, lowest_score, sample_uri, sample_ua, first_seen
| limit 100
